title: New Neighbor
description: Someone moved in next door. They seem friendly but you're not sure if you have the energy for socializing.

choices.text: Bring over food and introduce yourself
Wave from the window — keep it casual

title: Industry Conference
description: An invitation to speak at a professional conference. 500 people in the audience.

choices.text: Accept and prepare a killer presentation
Attend but don't speak — network from the audience
Decline — public speaking isn't your thing

title: Organization Finds Your Profile
description: A top company found your VOLAURA profile. Your Gold-level Communication badge caught their attention.

choices.text: Accept the interview — this could change everything
Not interested — happy where you are

title: Mentorship Opportunity
description: A junior colleague asks you to be their mentor. Teaching takes time but builds leadership.

choices.text: Accept — helping others grow is the real reward
Suggest they find someone more experienced
